title: NYS Uniform Building Code Update Held, Housing Technical Corrections, and Land Bank Property Transfers
summary: Item 27 (NYS Uniform Fire Prevention and Building Code update) held pending rescheduled state meeting after prior cancellation. Items 28-29 are technical housing corrections. Items 30-35 request property transfers to Greater Syracuse Property Development Corporation (land bank) following foreclosure. Item 30 withdrawn for internal discussion on long-term land use.
raw_content:
[00:33:22] I have items 27 through 35.
[00:33:26] >> Good afternoon, council. Jake Dishaw,
[00:33:27] deputy commissioner of code enforcement
[00:33:29] and zoning administration. Uh just a
[00:33:31] quick reminder and update on item 27. Um
[00:33:34] this was a carryover. If you recall the
[00:33:36] last council meeting for those of you
[00:33:38] that were um in the last uh meeting
[00:33:41] before the new year, um we had a meeting
[00:33:43] scheduled with the state in person and
[00:33:45] they canled due to illness. Um we need
[00:33:48] to reconnect with them. Um, and we hope
[00:33:51] we can we can have this resolved and
[00:33:53] finalized um, pretty soon here. So, I
[00:33:57] kindly ask for a hold and we'll keep you
[00:34:00] up to date.
[00:34:01] >> Thank you.
[00:34:02] >> Thank you.
[00:34:10] >> Good afternoon, counselors. Kimone
[00:34:11] Jordan, director of housing and
